Subject: Verification required for your request
From: compliance@personfinder.com

Hello,

Before we can process your data removal request, we need you to
verify your identity. Please follow the link below and upload
a copy of your government-issued ID:

https://personfinder.example.com/verify/ABC123

This verification step is required to protect against fraudulent
deletion requests. Once verified we will process your request
within 14 business days.

Thank you,
Privacy Team
PersonFinder
